cells.value: §2 - Budget normalized (two TAM stream bases per class/FY)
§3a - Per-stream supplier coefficients (feed TAM; $-weighted, gated, in-scope)

cells.formula: IF(SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*(1-'POP Corpus'!I17:I674)*'POP Corpus'!J17:J674*('POP Corpus'!G17:G674="BC")*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674)=0,"",SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*(1-'POP Corpus'!I17:I674)*'POP Corpus'!J17:J674*('POP Corpus'!G17:G674="BC")*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674*('POP Corpus'!N17:N674+'POP Corpus'!O17:O674))/SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*(1-'POP Corpus'!I17:I674)*'POP Corpus'!J17:J674*('POP Corpus'!G17:G674="BC")*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674))

IF(SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*(1-'POP Corpus'!I17:I674)*'POP Corpus'!J17:J674*('POP Corpus'!G17:G674="AP_LLTM")*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674)=0,"",SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*(1-'POP Corpus'!I17:I674)*'POP Corpus'!J17:J674*('POP Corpus'!G17:G674="AP_LLTM")*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674*('POP Corpus'!N17:N674+'POP Corpus'!O17:O674))/SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*(1-'POP Corpus'!I17:I674)*'POP Corpus'!J17:J674*('POP Corpus'!G17:G674="AP_LLTM")*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674))

IF(SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*(1-'POP Corpus'!I17:I674)*'POP Corpus'!J17:J674*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674)=0,"",SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*(1-'POP Corpus'!I17:I674)*'POP Corpus'!J17:J674*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674*('POP Corpus'!N17:N674+'POP Corpus'!O17:O674))/SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*(1-'POP Corpus'!I17:I674)*'POP Corpus'!J17:J674*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674))
IF(SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674)=0,"",SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674*'POP Corpus'!L17:L674)/SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674))
IF(SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674)=0,"",SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674*'POP Corpus'!M17:M674)/SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674))
IF(SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674)=0,"",SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674*'POP Corpus'!N17:N674)/SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674))
IF(SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674)=0,"",SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674*'POP Corpus'!O17:O674)/SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674))

cells.value: §3c - Distributed-production view (appendix; broader than commercial TAM)
§3d - Reconciliation & scope variants (reference; not applied to TAM)

cells.formula: IF(SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*('POP Corpus'!G17:G674="BC")*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674)=0,"",SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*('POP Corpus'!G17:G674="BC")*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674*('POP Corpus'!N17:N674+'POP Corpus'!O17:O674))/SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*('POP Corpus'!G17:G674="BC")*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674))

IF(SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*(1-'POP Corpus'!I17:I674)*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674)=0,"",SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*(1-'POP Corpus'!I17:I674)*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674*('POP Corpus'!N17:N674+'POP Corpus'!O17:O674))/SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*(1-'POP Corpus'!I17:I674)*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674))

IF(SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674)=0,"",SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674*('POP Corpus'!N17:N674+'POP Corpus'!O17:O674))/SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!H17:H674*'POP Corpus'!K17:K674))

cells.value: Total weighted coefficient (TAM / TAM base, all FY)

cells.formula: N('TAM Build'!C44)+N('TAM Build'!D44)+N('TAM Build'!E44)+N('TAM Build'!F44)+N('TAM Build'!G44)+N('TAM Build'!H44)

cells.value: Portfolio TAM = BC TAM + AP/LLTM TAM

cells.formula: IF(ABS(('TAM Build'!C125)-((N('TAM Build'!C117)+N('TAM Build'!D117)+N('TAM Build'!E117)+N('TAM Build'!F117)+N('TAM Build'!G117)+N('TAM Build'!H117))+(N('TAM Build'!C118)+N('TAM Build'!D118)+N('TAM Build'!E118)+N('TAM Build'!F118)+N('TAM Build'!G118)+N('TAM Build'!H118))))<0.5,"OK","FAIL")
